meaning: n.吾珥,乌尔(古代美索不达亚南部苏美尔的重要城市)
examples: UR ensures the highest level of performance at the cost of some data inconsistency.
Whether they are a peculiar sister group, or the ur-snake from which all others descend?
My vote for the most important cities in the world in the period leading up to 2000 B.C. would be Ur, Iraq.
One of the hubs of Mesopotamia, Ur was founded in the fourth millennium B.
Chief Guest of the event was Justice (Retd.) Khalil-ur-Rehman Khan, Chairman, Punjab Compulsory Education Commission.
